summary: Iteration 33 - Session Design Tweaks Testing COMPLETE. All requested features verified: Homepage sessions section has purple gradient from admin settings (no gold dots), Session detail page has hero with purple gradient + golden stars, white body content, purple-tinted info cards, light testimonials, white question form, dark booking sidebar. Admin panel has purple intensity controls (light/medium/strong) for both homepage and session page.
